name: Church's Fried Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 4-cup container, combine all ingredients and mix thoroughly until blended.
2. Cover tightly and store at room temperature for up to 3 months.
3. To prepare: Dip chicken pieces in egg mixture, then coat with dry coating mix, returning them to the egg to lightly coat, and finally back to the dry mix.
4. Heat oil in a heavy skillet to piping hot.
5. Fry pieces skin-side down for 4 to 6 minutes over medium-high heat.
6. Turn pieces and fry underside for a few minutes.
7. Transfer to an oiled or Pam-sprayed 9x12x2 pan.
8. Cover the pan with foil, sealing it on three sides of the pan.
9. Bake at 350°F for about 45 to 50 minutes.
10. Remove foil and bake an additional 5 minutes to crisp the coating.
11. Serves 4.
Source: Gloria Pitzer Sims wrote:
